claimText: The ADEETIE scheme is implemented by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) under the Ministry of Power.
evidenceExcerpt: ADEETIE is implemented by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) under the Ministry of Power.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the correct implementing agency and nodal ministry.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)
Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE)
Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)

claimText: The ADEETIE scheme targets MSMEs possessing a Udyam ID to help them reduce energy consumption by 30-50%.
evidenceExcerpt: It targets MSMEs with a Udyam ID to reduce energy consumption by 30-50%.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the eligibility criteria and the specific energy reduction target.

claimText: Under the ADEETIE scheme, Micro and Small Enterprises receive a 5% interest subvention, while Medium Enterprises receive a 3% interest subvention.
evidenceExcerpt: The scheme provides a 5% interest subvention for Micro and Small Enterprises and 3% for Medium Enterprises.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching the enterprise category with its respective interest subvention rate.
distractorHooks: Flat 5% interest subvention for all MSMEs
3% for Micro and Small Enterprises and 5% for Medium Enterprises
Capital subsidy instead of interest subvention

claimText: The ADEETIE scheme has a budgetary outlay of ₹1000 crore and is designed for a 3-year duration from FY 2025-26 to FY 2027-28.
evidenceExcerpt: The budgetary outlay is ₹1000 crore over a 3-year duration (FY 2025-26 to FY 2027-28).
examUse: Statement-based question verifying the financial outlay and implementation timeline of the scheme.
